subject: status of ge and abb breakout contracts

emails.subject: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.subject_base: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.body: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts Your right. We're very close there. Lee just sent a message to you and when done with his adds we'll be ready to finalize on the GE contract. The ABB is a bit of a FUBAR because of versions that are not current. Peter is tackling this and working with Don Hammond. Should be ready soon.

emails.subject: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.subject_base: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.body: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts Bill, I don't have any information about the ABB contract. At last word, Lee Johnson was reviewing the latest version of the GE contract that Pete Thompson had sent out. Kay From: Bill Williams ECT 04/26/2001 10:33 AM

emails.subject: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.subject_base: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.body: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts OK. Our input is for technical information (Scope and performance) Who is responsible for this document overall? If the answer is me...please let me know. Who do I contact in Global finance.

emails.subject: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.subject_base: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.body: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts Don't forget that Global Finance is supposed to review these. They have the turbine contract.

emails.subject: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.subject_base: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.body: I would think that Dale would have the legal lead, since he is the project's lawyer. Lisa Bills, Roseann Engeldorf and Catherine Clark are the people I send TurboPark stuff to. Kay Bill Williams@ECT 04/26/2001 06:37 PM

emails.subject: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.subject_base: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts
emails.body: Re: Status of GE and ABB Breakout Contracts Thanks Kay. Dale is to call me this morning with the GF contact name and I will get a heads up to that person this morning, providing Peter's mark ups and final.
